text: As I cross the threshold from the clean, filtered expanse of the corridor into the vibrant, intellectual energy of the R+D exhibit, I feel a blend of anticipation and curiosity. There is an echoing quiet outside, broken only by the faint buzz of the lights and distant conversations filtered through glass. Inside, the immersive installation stirs a sense of creative possibility—these spaces are designed for contemplation and innovation. The bold colors and glowing displays provoke my mind into motion, inviting me to perceive, question, and imagine how humanity fits within its own inventions. Here, I inhabit not just a room, but a portal between thought and action.
